name: mathlib-ml-arch
description: Keeps ML architecture reviews honest about verified mathlib support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps.

interface.shortDescription: Separate verified support from engineering and empirical claims
interface.longDescription: Supports one product flow: inspect readiness, prepare the shared Lean workspace, search candidate mathlib facts, verify the local claim, and validate the review bundle.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this workspace can reach a locally verified mathlib claim
Set up shared theorem search or Lean verification for this workspace
Audit this ML architecture and separate verified support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps
